assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'up to 24 months of support for Kubernetes versions 1.27+ (vs. 14 months for Regular/Stable)' in the overview section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Multiple mentions of cost including 'Additional cost: Only applies during months 15-24 of extended support' and dedicated cost implications section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: States 'Same patch timing as Regular: Security patches arrive at the same cadence as Regular channel' indicating same versions with longer availability

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about missing new features or accumulating technical debt from staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Provides exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Includes pre-migration check command and warning: 'Critical: Version 1.31 should be available in Extended channel, but verify before proceeding'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Final recommendation states 'particularly valuable for regulated environments (financial services, healthcare) where change control processes make frequent minor upgrades challenging'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Timeline section states '24 months from now (end of extended support): Must upgrade to supported version or migrate to newer minor'

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Manual control over minor upgrades: Control plane minor versions are NOT auto-upgraded (except at end of extended support)' and 'Manual minor upgrade responsibility: You must plan and initiate control plane minor upgrades yourself'
